message:
fix(writing): optimize Hoeffding visualizations and fix key generation

OutlierCrusher Performance Fix:
- Move `getRanks()` computation from inside the map() callback to a
  useMemo hook at the component level
- Previously, getRanks() was being called once per bar on every render,
  causing O(n²) complexity for what should be O(n) work
- The ranks array now recomputes only when points change, not on every
  map iteration
- This eliminates redundant rank calculations and improves render
  performance, especially noticeable with larger datasets

RankingVisualizer Key Stability Fix:
- Replace `Date.now()` with `Math.random()` for generating item IDs
- Date.now() can produce duplicate IDs when items are added in rapid
  succession (within the same millisecond), causing React key conflicts
- Math.random() provides sufficient uniqueness for this use case where
  items are only used within a single session and never persisted
- Prevents potential "duplicate key" React warnings and ensures stable
  component identity for animations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
